text: Do you think that you can get away with this?
Did you really think I wouldn't figure this out?
Oh no look man, I'm not into that stuff. Okay?
Japan made me do it. It's not me. It's Japan. I promise.
You don't think I know what you're doing.
You're stealing people's information through phones.
Yeah. I'm banning Huawei phones from my country.
Wait, what? You can't do that.
Yeah, I can you big thief.
I can go do something like that.
From now on, I'm only working with companies that don't steal people's data.
Ah, yeah. Ah, yeah. That is right.
